name: KontoFlux
description: Access German bank accounts and transactions via KontoFlux Open-Banking API (5000+ banks, read-only)

credentials_required.label: KontoFlux API Key
credentials_required.hint: Get your API key from kontoflux.io workspace settings

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all bank accounts in your KontoFlux workspace

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Get transactions with optional date and category filters

tools.name: check_scope
tools.description: Check API key permissions and access scope

author: freddy-schuetz
